working_definition: A mitotically active keratinocyte residing in the stratum basale of the interfollicular epidermis, expressing basal keratins KRT5 and KRT14, hemidesmosome components ITGA6 and COL17A1, and stemness transcription factor TP63. This population encompasses both keratinocyte stem cells and transit-amplifying cells, serving as the progenitor pool for epidermal renewal and giving rise to dual differentiation trajectories toward terminally differentiated keratinocytes.

best_match.cl_definition: A mitotically active, columnar-shaped keratinocyte located in the stratum basale of the epidermis and attached to the basement membrane. This cell exhibits heterogeneity, encompassing stem and progenitor subpopulations with distinct molecular and proliferative characteristics (Haensel et al., 2020), and serves as the primary source of new keratinocytes for epidermal renewal, homeostasis, and regeneration.

justification: CL:0002187 'basal cell of epidermis' matches the c1 cluster on all defining criteria: location in the stratum basale, attachment to the basement membrane via hemidesmosomal integrin complexes (ITGA6, COL17A1), expression of basal keratins KRT5/KRT14, and a heterogeneous progenitor identity encompassing stem and transit-amplifying subpopulations. The term 'undifferentiated keratinocyte' is used synonymously with 'basal keratinocyte' throughout the Reynolds et al. (2021) atlas from which this cluster is drawn. The CL definition explicitly acknowledges the stem-and-progenitor heterogeneity described in the report.

other_candidates.cl_definition: A stem cell found in the basal layer of the epidermis, hair follicle, and sebaceous gland, characterised by its quiescent nature, high proliferative potential, and capacity for long-term self-renewal.
other_candidates.reason_rejected: Too narrow: applies only to the quiescent stem cell fraction. The c1 cluster encompasses the full undifferentiated basal compartment including transit-amplifying cells, not exclusively the stem cell subpopulation.

recommendation: Use CL:0002187 (basal cell of epidermis). This is a precise exact match for the undifferentiated basal keratinocyte population defined by KRT5/KRT14/TP63 expression and stratum basale residence.
